📋 Weekly Summary ?A quick overview of your social media this week. Read this first to get the big picture!

Here's what you need to know — no data science required
Our social media presence is steady. There's room to grow — the data shows a few opportunities we can take advantage of. We had a standout post that performed 59.5x above average!

📊 Key Numbers ?The most important numbers from all your platforms at a glance.

  • 📊 We've published 166 posts in total
  • 👀 Instagram: reached 279,080 people
  • 👀 TikTok: 567,199 video views
  • 💬 We received 130,676 interactions (likes, comments, shares, saves)
  • 👥 We gained 2,235 new followers across all platforms
  • 📈 Instagram reach grew 261% compared to last week

✅ What's Working ?Content and strategies that are performing well right now. Keep doing these!

  • Short Video posts on Instagram get the best engagement (25 posts analyzed)
  • Short Video posts on TikTok get the best engagement (18 posts analyzed)
  • Wednesday is our best performing day
  • Using emojis increases engagement on Instagram
  • Using emojis increases engagement on TikTok
  • Our post "[아토스 성산 영적 순례 | Pilgrimage to Mount Athos] From F" went viral on Instagram (59.5x above average)

⚠️ What Needs Attention ?Areas where performance is dropping or could be better. Worth a look.

  • Instagram reach has been declining recently — try new content formats or increase posting frequency
  • TikTok reach has been declining recently — try new content formats or increase posting frequency
  • Our audience may be getting tired of Image posts on Instagram (engagement is dropping)
  • We're getting lots of likes but very few comments — try asking questions or creating discussion-worthy content

🎯 This Week's Actions ?Specific, easy steps you can take this week to improve your results.

  1. Create more Short Video content on Instagram — it's your top performer
  2. Schedule your most important post for 9:00 KST
  3. Try posting 8 times per week on Instagram (currently ~6)
  4. Short Video content is gaining momentum on TikTok — invest more in this format

🔴[Content] Viral content on TikTok: Short Video. Create more content in these formats.

🟢[Platform] TikTok is outperforming industry benchmark by 7.8%! Keep up the great work.
